category_sources: Official libxml2 API documentation describes it as an XML toolkit implemented in C and originally developed for GNOME.
source_facts.description says libxml2 is the GNOME XML library.
display_name_sources: Official GNOME documentation uses libxml2 as the project name.
docs_sources: Official GNOME Pages site provides libxml2 API documentation.
Official documentation points to the GNOME GitLab repository and GNOME source releases.
repo_sources: Official libxml2 documentation states the git repository is hosted on GNOME GitLab at GNOME/libxml2.
source_facts.source-archive is hosted under official GNOME sources for libxml2.
tags_sources: Official libxml2 docs describe XML and HTML toolkit APIs in C.
